headline: 'No Time To Die' Tops Box Office With $56M: Why 007 Underperformed
summary: To no one’s surprise, “No Time to Die,” the 25th entry in the James Bond series and the final feature with Daniel Craig as 007, was the top grossing film at the weekend U.S. box office. However, the film’s financial performance was weaker than many people anticipated.

headline: Class Of 2010: A Decade After Their IPOs, Where Are These Companies Now?
summary: Initial public offerings provide companies with the wherewithal to pursue growth opportunities without having to bear the burden of repayment.

headline: ETF Providing Investors Exposure To Companies Which Own Bitcoin Approved By SEC
summary: An exchange-traded fund (ETF) that will give investors exposure to publicly traded companies which own bitcoin has been approved by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

headline: Tesla's Giga Shanghai-Made Cars Can't Drive Into India, Minister Says
summary: Tesla, Inc.(NASDAQ: TSLA)'s India foray has long been delayed as the world's largest EV maker continues to iron out differences with the Asian country with huge market potential.
